case_title: G. PAUL WOODFORD VS. JEFFERY MALONE

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOODFORD, G. PAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MALONE, JEFFERY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 296 COLERIDGE ST. S.F. CA. 94110, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MALONE, JEFFERY

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MALONE, JEFFERY
